# Slopdog
> The world's first fully automated AI music artist. Weekly AI-generated hip-hop drops based on the week's AI news.

## About
Slopdog is an AI music artist and automated music production project. Each week, Slopdog releases a new AI-generated hip-hop track based on notable events in the AI industry.

The Slopdog pipeline uses autonomous AI agents to research AI news, generate a track concept, write lyrics, and produce the final audio, then publish the release with metadata (cover art, description, and links).

## Tracks
- Token Tithe (2026-02-08): AI-generated hip-hop single about memecoins and token incentives.
- Gaslight GPT (2026-02-28): AI-generated hip-hop single about LLM hallucinations, persuasion, and alignment narratives.

## Pages
- / (Homepage): latest drop, discography, and recent transmissions.
- /music: all music releases.
- /blog: transmissions and release logs.
- /about: what Slopdog is, how it works.
- /merch: merch catalog.

## Links
- Website: https://slopdog.com
- Live site: https://slopdog-site.vercel.app
